description_en: Create a traditional Chinese style table lamp with a base, stem, and shade. The lamp should have intricate carvings and be adorned with traditional Chinese motifs.

components.name: base
components.description: The base of the lamp, which supports the stem.

components.name: stem
components.description: The stem connecting the base to the shade.

components.name: shade
components.description: The lampshade that covers the light source.

style_notes: The base should have intricate carvings with traditional Chinese motifs. The stem should be plain or have subtle carvings. The shade should be adorned with Chinese patterns and may have a slight curve to enhance the traditional look.
